news.headline: Discover the latest in crypto regulation with key legal actions, enforcement outcomes, and global policy shifts. Explore now.
news.summary: Discover the most recent developments in cryptocurrency regulation, encompassing important legal proceedings, outcomes of enforcement actions, and alterations in policy that are shaping the international cryptocurrency environment. Stay informed on the latest trends and changes in the industry.

news.headline: Analyst predicts potential $3K retracement for ETH amid ongoing consolidation within $3K-$4K range.
news.summary: According to crypto analyst Rekt Capital, there is a possibility that Ether will continue to consolidate within the range of $3,000 to $4,000. However, a potential pullback to $3,000 should not be ruled out.

news.headline: Sanctions relief could kickstart Syria's economy, which suffered from conflict with a weakened energy sector and battered currency.
news.summary: The energy sector has been severely impacted by years of conflict, leading to a significant deterioration in the national currency and hindering overall economic growth. Experts argue that in order to revitalize the economy, the West should consider relaxing financial restrictions in the country.

news.headline: BTC hits $87k amid ETF outflows. $4bn moved by miners since Nov 12. Bhutan sells $100m BTC. 18 states sue SEC over crypto. Shimini at 16 month high. Tether launches platform. Gensler defends stance. Bitfinex hacker sentenced.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) briefly surged to a high of $87,000 before retracting due to ETF outflows. BTC ETFs experienced their third highest outflow since their launch. Bitcoin miners have transferred a total of $4 billion worth of BTC since November 12th. Former president Trump has expressed interest in a 0% capital gains tax on cryptocurrency. Senator Lummis suggests selling gold reserves to invest in Bitcoin. Pennsylvania has introduced a bill to establish a BTC reserve. Bhutan recently sold $100 million worth of BTC. 18 US states along with the DeFi Lobby are suing the SEC over crypto regulations. SEC Chair Gensler defends his stance on crypto amid rumors of his potential departure. Ripple's XRP reaches a 16-month high on news of Gensler potentially leaving. Tether has launched a platform to simplify tokenization processes. The mysterious founder Satoshi Nakamoto's BTC holdings are estimated at $100 billion. Bitwise has filed for listing a crypto index ETP. The Bitfinex hacker has been sentenced to five years in prison. Sling Money has introduced a 'global Venmo' service for US users. Web4 development is set to integrate cryptocurrencies and Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). South Korea plans to fine Upbit for violations related to Know Your Customer (KYC) procedures.

news.headline: Ponke, a $300M meme coin, gains popularity due to its unique social media strategy emphasizing TikTok and Instagram.
news.summary: Ponke is a cryptocurrency inspired by a reckless monkey known for gambling and trading regularly. Its unique social media strategy sets it apart from other tokens, with a strong focus on platforms like TikTok and Instagram that are typically overlooked.

news.headline: Crypto gaming on the rise in the Philippines as Yield Guild Games gears up for a summit in Manila, signaling a shift in the Web3 gaming sector.
news.summary: Sander Lutz from Decrypt and Puke Rainbow, the creator of Rug Radio, recently had a conversation with Gabby Dizon, one of the co-founders of Yield Guild Games. They discussed the company's forthcoming summit in Manila and delved into the reasons behind the significant growth of the Web3 gaming sector. The industry, which is on the cusp of a significant evolution, is garnering attention for its potential.

news.headline: BTC reaches record high weekly close; Nvidia earnings due, BONK hits $5B, Solana surging. ETFs: BTC -$370mn, ETH -$60mn. XRP at $1.3, Gensler resignation likely post-Thanksgiving. ETH/BTC breaks 8-year support. DOGE investors sue Elon for $248bn. NY cuts back on crypto convictions.
news.summary: BTC Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) experienced outflows of approximately $370 million, while ETH ETFs saw outflows of about $60 million. Bitcoin achieved its highest weekly close ever, with the total market cap of cryptocurrencies reaching an all-time high. XRP surpassed the $1.3 mark fueled by optimism regarding a potential change in regulations. Gary Gensler is expected to step down post-Thanksgiving. The meme coin craze boosted SOL to $250. BTC ETFs recorded inflows of $1.7 billion in the past week, while ETH ETFs observed record weekly inflows. The ETH/BTC pair broke an 8-year support line. Base and SOL led the weekly crypto inflows as opposed to ETH. DOGE investors filed a lawsuit against Elon Musk seeking $248 billion. Donald Trump is now accessible. Metaplanet plans to secure an additional $11.3 million for BTC acquisitions. Galaxy predicts BTC reaching $100,000 in the coming weeks, while Cathie Wood anticipates BTC hitting $1-1.5 million by 2030. RFK stated that the majority of their wealth is invested in BTC. Tether introduced stablecoins compliant with the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA). Elon Musk impeded OpenAI's intention to issue a token. New York plans to reduce resources allocated to prosecuting crypto cases.

news.headline: BTC ETF options launch, tensions rise between Russia-US, ZEREBRO value reaches $470M. BTC hits $92k, Blackrock pushes for $4.6bn BTC buy, aiming for $100k. Binance offers stablecoin product at 20% APY. MicroStrategy plans $1.75bn BTC investment. GS explores digital asset tech spinoff. LIDO DAO classified as General Partnership. Trump Media in talks to acquire Bakkt. SOL hits record high value, overtakes ETH activity. Genius launches $10mn BTC treasury move. Semler Scientific invests $17.7mn in BTC. Gemini expands to France. Russia enforces 15% crypto tax. Judge denies Kraken’s SEC appeal. Mining profits recover.
news.summary: Bitcoin has surged to $92,000, with experts now believing $100,000 is not merely a dream. The highly anticipated Blackrock Bitcoin ETF options are set to debut today. MicroStrategy has invested a whopping $4.6 billion in Bitcoin and plans to add another $1.75 billion. Binance has introduced a product similar to stablecoin offering a high 20% Annual Percentage Yield (APY). Goldman Sachs is considering spinning out its digital assets technology platform. In California, the LIDO DAO has been identified as a General Partnership. Trump Media is in negotiations to acquire the cryptocurrency exchange Bakkt, as former President Trump meets with Coinbase CEO Armstrong. Solana (SOL) has reached its highest-ever weekly economic value and co-founder Toly has released a concise roadmap. SOL has surpassed Ethereum in terms of activity on Nansen. Genius has initiated a Bitcoin treasury play with an initial investment of $10 million. In other news, Semler Scientific has purchased $17.7 million worth of Bitcoin. Gemini has launched its services in France alongside Russia imposing a 15% tax on cryptocurrencies. A judge has denied Kraken's motion to appeal against the SEC. Mining profits have rebounded from their all-time lows.

news.headline: Nym to launch 'First Decentralized Mixnet' VPN with CEO Harry Halpin, discussing privacy, crypto, crackdowns.
news.summary: At Web Summit, Harry Halpin, CEO of Nym, discussed the distinctive features of its mixnet VPN with Stephen Graves of Decrypt. They delved into the challenges posed by the worldwide suppression of privacy initiatives. Moreover, they pondered over the sustainability of the favorable relationship between the crypto industry and the Trump administration.

news.headline: BTC reaches all-time high at $93.5k, SOL fees spike, CHILLGUY nets $250M. Blackrock's BTC ETF options hit $1.9bn volume. Grayscale introduces BTC ETF options. Rider to offer tokenized money market funds. Robinhood lauded for deregulation. Lutnick to lead commerce dept. Sky rolls out USDS on Solana. Injective debuts AI agent platform. South Korea to impose 20% crypto tax. Trump eyes crypto lawyer for SEC. Chainlink part of Brazil CBDC pilot. Saylor to advise Microsoft on BTC strategy. Rumble's CEO teases BTC adoption. Bitsfinex introduces tokenized T-bills in El Salvador. Coinbase to delist WBTC. EUR crypto M&A rises due to MiCA compliance. Phantom surpasses Chrome on app store downloads.
news.summary: The price of BTC reaches a new all-time high of $93.5k. Blackrock's BTC ETF options witness a trading volume of $1.9 billion. Grayscale announces the launch of Bitcoin ETF options. Solana's fees hit a record high in a day due to the frenzy around meme coins. Phantom surpasses Chrome on the app store. Michael Saylor plans to present a Bitcoin strategy to the Microsoft board. Rumble's stock sees an increase as the CEO hints at Bitcoin adoption. Bernstein suggests Robinhood is the top choice for trades following deregulation. Former President Trump contemplates appointing a crypto lawyer to lead the SEC. The commerce department will be led by a pro-crypto figure, Lutnick. Sky deploys stablecoin USDS on the Solana network. Archax to introduce tokenized money market funds. Bitfinex offers tokenized T-bills in El Salvador. Coinbase to remove WBTC from its list. MiCA compliance sparks a surge in crypto mergers and acquisitions in Europe. South Korea plans to introduce a 20% tax on cryptocurrencies. Chainlink joins Brazil's CBDC trade pilot initiative. Injective launches an AI agent platform.

news.headline: BTC breaks new ATH at $98k; US spot BTC ETFs exceed $100bn. Stablecoin inflow hits $9.7bn. Bitwise applies for SOL ETF. ETH at 4-year low vs. BTC. Former FTX CTO avoids prison. Nvidia highlights Agentic AI in earnings. Coinbase offers 4.7% APY on USDC. Japan plans crypto tax reform.
news.summary: Bitcoin has hit a new all-time high, climbing to $98,000. US spot Bitcoin ETFs have exceeded $100 billion in assets. The Bitcoin CME open interest has reached a record high of $21.3 billion. Ethereum is currently at a 4-year low compared to Bitcoin. Stablecoin inflows have surged to a record-breaking $9.7 billion this month. Former President Trump is considering the creation of the first cryptocurrency czar position. Bitwise has applied for a SOL ETF. BitGo has introduced SGP services and aims for expansion. A Shanghai court has officially recognized cryptocurrency as property. Former FTX CTO Wang avoids prison time. Nvidia is promoting Agentic AI in their results, leading to a surge in AI coin prices. Coinbase is offering a 4.7% APY on USDC. Arkham has launched a spot trading platform in the US. Japan is set to implement cryptocurrency tax reform.

news.headline: BTC close to $100k, Citron shorts MicroStrategy, MOG at $1B. SEC chair resigns, Trump forms crypto committee. XRP surges on Gensler exit. MicroStrategy drops 16%. SOL hits ATH. B2C2 issues bond on Ethereum. El Salvador BTC profits $305mn. CFPB to regulate big tech wallets. Charles Schwab to offer crypto. Trump Media eyes crypto platform. FTX starts repayments in 2025. USDC launches on Aptos. WisdomTree debuts XRP ETP. SEC's broker-dealer rule overturned.
news.summary: Bitcoin is approaching $100,000, reaching another all-time high. SEC Chair Gary Gensler will resign in January 2025. The Trump administration plans to establish a cryptocurrency advisory committee. Following news of Gensler's exit, XRP surged to a three-year high. MicroStrategy experienced a 16% drop as Citron shorted its stock. Solana (SOL) broke its all-time high on Coinbase. B2C2 is set to issue its first bond on the Ethereum network. El Salvador's Bitcoin profits total $305 million. A legal victory resulted in the SEC broker-dealer rule being struck down. The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau will oversee big tech digital wallets excluding cryptocurrency. Charles Schwab will begin offering cryptocurrency directly to clients. Trump Media is exploring the creation of a cryptocurrency payment platform. FTX will initiate creditor repayments starting in March 2025. Circle's USDC stablecoin will debut on the Aptos platform. WisdomTree introduced an XRP Exchange-Traded Product (ETP).

news.headline: Creators of AI agents Truth Terminal, Fi, and MycelialOracle discuss meme coins with Decrypt. Announcement coming soon.
news.summary: Developers behind the AI personalities Truth Terminal, Fi, and MycelialOracle discuss their involvement in meme coins with Decrypt. The AI agents, including Fi with fatherly concerns, have delved into this world. Additionally, the trio has a significant announcement to make.

news.headline: BTC dominance drops as ETH/BTC trend shifts. Bessent for Treasury. BTC may hit $180k per Van Eck. CBOE launching BTC ETF options in Dec. PumpFun criticized. ZA bank in HK now trading crypto. AI's future is agents: Salesforce CEO. Aethir investing $100m in new crypto AI. Cantor Fitzgerald holds 5% Tether. Polymarket bans French traders. SEC commissioner to exit with Gensler. DeSci akin to early DeFi. Monad launches testnet.
news.summary: ETH/BTC begins to show reversal, leading to a decrease in BTC dominance in the market. Pro-crypto advocate Bessent has been nominated for a position in the Treasury. Van Eck predicts BTC could potentially soar to $180,000 during this market cycle. Plans are in place for the launch of BTC ETF-linked options by CBOE in December. Livestream platform PumpFun faces criticism over its content. A bank in ZA sets off crypto trading services in Hong Kong. According to Salesforce CEO, the future of AI lies in agents. Aethir is set to allocate a significant $100 million in new crypto AI projects. Cantor Fitzgerald reveals ownership of a 5% stake in Tether. Polymarket takes action to restrict French traders on its platform. An SEC commissioner plans to step down post the appointment of Gensler. DeSci is likened to early DeFi in 2019. Monad introduces its testnet to the market.

news.headline: BTC drops to $91K then bounces, Trump plans tariffs. ETH hits 4-month high before tumbling. UK to unveil new crypto rules. MicroStrategy acquires $5.4bn BTC. And more: Pantera's fund sees 1000x gains, Rumble reveals $20mn BTC strategy, El Salvador considers renting volcanoes to miners, and more. Morocco to legalize crypto, suriname candidate seeks BTC plan. Sun now top investor in Trump's DeFi project. XRP, SOL, LTC, HBAR ETFs potentially in a year.
news.summary: Bitcoin's recent correction is attributed to actions by long-term holders. Ethereum surged to a 4-month high before experiencing a drop. The UK is set to introduce comprehensive regulations for cryptocurrencies. MicroStrategy has purchased an additional $5.4 billion worth of Bitcoin. Predictions suggest that Bitcoin reaching $100,000 is just the beginning, according to the CEO of Galaxy Digital. Pantera's Bitcoin fund has seen a staggering 1000x increase since its inception. Rumble has disclosed a $20 million Bitcoin reserve strategy. In a unique move, El Salvador is considering renting out 170 volcanoes to Bitcoin miners. Morocco is on the verge of legalizing cryptocurrencies. A political candidate in Suriname is advocating for a Bitcoin strategy if elected. Justin Sun has become the top investor in former President Trump's DeFi project. Bloomberg predicts that ETFs for XRP, SOL, LTC, and HBAR may take up to a year to materialize.

news.headline: BTC bounces after $600m losses. Chance for $100k in 2024. BTC could dip before $100k: StanChart. Brazil suggests $18bn BTC reserve. US can't sanction Tornado Cash. Trump wants CFTC to oversee digital assets. BTC may fall 20% with M2 link. Bitwise requests BTC & ETH mixed ETP. XRP sends $25mn to Crypto PAC. Iran plans digital CBDC launch to evade sanctions.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) has made a recovery following $600 million in liquidations. Options indicate a 50% probability for BTC reaching $100,000 by 2024. However, it is possible for BTC to dip lower before hitting this milestone, as per StanChart predictions. Meanwhile, a Brazilian congressman has proposed the establishment of an $18 billion BTC reserve. Interestingly, the US is unable to impose sanctions on Tornado Cash. Former President Trump is advocating for the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) to take the helm in regulating digital assets. There is a warning that BTC could see a 20% decline if the correlation with M2 money supply returns. Bitwise has applied for a mixed exchange-traded product (ETP) for both BTC and Ethereum (ETH). XRP has transferred an additional $25 million to a Crypto PAC. Additionally, Iran is gearing up to introduce a digital central bank digital currency (CBDC) to circumvent economic sanctions.

news.headline: In 2025 rate review, PGE approved for investments in storage, infrastructure, maintenance by Oregon PUC.
news.summary: Today, the Oregon Public Utility Commission (OPUC) announced its decision on the 2025 rate review, emphasizing investments in battery storage, transmission infrastructure, and maintenance to enhance reliability for customers. The rate decision, made in Portland, Oregon, on Dec. 20, 2024, is aimed at boosting the efficiency and dependability of services. This move signifies a strategic effort to prioritize the enhancement of customer experience while addressing the need for modernized energy systems.

news.headline: ETH at 5-month peak; HK to cut crypto taxes to zero. XT hacked, funds pulled for ETH. Stablecoins at $190bn cap. BTC-friendly Vancouver. SOS eyes $50mn BTC buy. Metamask adds Venmo on-ramp. Celsius to share $127mn. Russia's new crypto tax bill, Tether closes Euro stablecoin. Bitwise files 10 crypto ETF with SEC. 21Shares debuts 4 European ETPs. Vitalik donates $1m to Tornado Cash. GFT team increases token size.
news.summary: Ethereum (ETH) reaches a 5-month high and leads other major cryptocurrencies. Alternative coins related to ETH, particularly focusing on decentralized finance (DeFi) and meme coins, are also on the rise. The government of Hong Kong is expected to announce a policy of zero taxes on cryptocurrency. Hyperliquid is set to introduce a new cryptocurrency called HYPE through a $310 million offering. XT platform experiences a security breach resulting in the withdrawal of all funds in Ethereum. Stablecoins have reached a market cap of a record-breaking $190 billion. The Base network achieves a milestone of 10 million transactions in a single day. Metaplanet plans to raise $62 million for the acquisition of Bitcoin. The mayor of Vancouver announces plans to transform the city into a "Bitcoin-friendly" environment. SOS declares intentions to purchase $50 million worth of Bitcoin, causing a 40% increase in stock value. Metamask integrates a fiat on-ramp feature through Venmo. Celsius Network announces the distribution of $127 million to creditors. Russia passes a new bill regarding cryptocurrency taxation. Tether announces the discontinuation of its Euro-backed stablecoin. Bitwise files with the SEC for a 10-cryptocurrency index ETF. 21Shares launches four new European cryptocurrency exchange-traded products (ETPs). Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin donates $1 million towards defending Tornado Cash. Former CFTC Chair Giancarlo emerges as a potential candidate for a cryptocurrency leadership role. GFT team adjusts token size as Binance removes the tokens from its platform.

news.headline: Fastex lauds NFT innovation at ftNFT YoCerebrum Awards in Malta. 3rd edition honored outstanding achievements in NFT field with Decrypt's Ben White and artists, creators, innovators.
news.summary: The third edition of the ftNFT YoCerebrum Awards took place at Fort Manoel in Malta, gathering NFT leaders and influencers. Decrypt's Ben White was present at the event alongside the nominees, including artists, creators, and innovators recognized for their exceptional contributions to the NFT space.

news.headline: BTC approaches $100K, ETH underperforms. BTC whales buy $1.5B during dip. ETH TVL surges to $80B. ETH co-founder transfers $72M to Kraken. BTC ETF inflows peak in Nov. BTC to $132K by 2025. $13.6B BTC options expire. HYPE hits $4.5B. XRP stands out. BTC DeFi to lead in 3 years. HK subsidizes tokenized bonds. Coinbase halts USDC earn in EU. Stablecoins to reach 10% of M2. Debanking linked to Warren. Taiwan enforces stricter crypto AML. USDX stablecoin secures $45M. Justin Sun buys $6M banana artwork.
news.summary: Bitcoin is once again approaching the $100,000 mark while Ethereum is showing weaker performance. During a recent dip, Bitcoin whales collectively acquired $1.5 billion worth of BTC. Ethereum decentralized finance total value locked (TVL) has surged to a two-year high, surpassing $80 billion. One of Ethereum's co-founders transferred $72 million worth of ETH to the Kraken exchange. In November, inflows into Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) reached an all-time high. Analysts predict Bitcoin could reach $132,000 by 2025. Additionally, $13.6 billion in Bitcoin options are set to expire on Friday. The highly anticipated project HYPE has launched, boasting a $450 million initial public offering and a $4.5 billion fully-diluted valuation. XRP continues to outperform other major cryptocurrencies. Cardano's Charles Hoskinson believes Bitcoin DeFi will dominate the crypto space in the next three years. The Hong Kong central bank is offering subsidies for tokenized bond issuance. Coinbase has suspended its USDC earn program in the EU. It is projected that stablecoins will account for 10% of M2 money supply. There is speculation that recent deplatforming trends are linked to Elizabeth Warren according to Brian Armstrong. Taiwan is accelerating the implementation of stricter anti-money laundering rules for cryptocurrencies. The USDX stablecoin has secured $45 million in funding. In a notable event, Justin Sun purchased a banana-themed artwork for $6 million.

news.headline: Don't miss MYRIAD Public Beta - the on-chain prediction markets by Decrypt and Rug Radio! Register at myriad.markets!
news.summary: Decrypt and Rug Radio are enhancing their interconnected media network by introducing on-chain prediction markets through MYRIAD. The public beta version of these markets will be released soon, and interested individuals can sign up at myriad.markets for participation.

news.headline: Public beta of MYRIAD, the new media ecosystem from Decrypt and Rug Radio, is live with on-chain prediction markets. Explore at myriad.markets!
news.summary: MYRIAD, the evolution of Decrypt and Rug Radio's interconnected media ecosystem with on-chain prediction markets, has been officially released in public beta. To begin exploring this innovative platform, visit myriad.markets today.

news.headline: Join MYRIAD and Pudgy Penguins for a Community Contest! Win prizes like Lil' Pudgys NFTs at myriad.markets. Participate now!
news.summary: MYRIAD, an on-chain prediction market by Decrypt and Rug Radio, has collaborated with Pudgy Penguins for its inaugural Community Contest! Participants can join to win various prizes, including Lil' Pudgys NFTs. To participate and potentially win, visit myriad.markets for more information.

news.headline: Ilan Hazan & Ryan Servatus discuss impact of decentralized storage on media solutions, rethinking business model.
news.summary: Ilan Hazan, one of the Co-Founders and COO of DASTAN, along with Ryan Servatus from Mysten Labs, recently explored the potential effects of advancements in decentralized storage on data resilience, scalability, and media services. The conversation highlighted the importance of these innovations in improving data management and security.

news.headline: Google suggests solution to address search dominance by allowing choice for companies and consumers.
news.summary: Suggestions put forth by the leading tech corporation involve giving options to both businesses and individuals when selecting a search engine.

news.headline: Giftify, Inc. plans registered direct offering for working capital; owner of digital platforms CardCash.com and Restaurant.com.
news.summary: Giftify, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ as GIFT, and known for operating popular digital platforms CardCash.com and Restaurant.com, revealed plans on Dec. 20, 2024, for a registered direct offering of securities. The objective of this offering is to generate funds for working capital. The success and specifications of the offering are dependent on market conditions, thus the completion timeline and final size or terms are uncertain. This move signifies the company's focus on incentives and rewards within retail, dining, and entertainment sectors.

news.headline: Xi emphasizes 'one country, two systems' as Macao celebrates 25 years of return to China. Commemoration marked with televised ceremony.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Chinese President Xi Jinping emphasized the importance of continuing to uphold the "one country, two systems" principle. This statement came as Macao commemorated 25 years since its reunification with China, acknowledging its remarkable progress. The President's remarks were delivered during a televised event at a significant sports venue.

news.headline: GoldMining renews at-the-market equity program allowing distribution of up to US$50 million. TSX: GOLD, NYSE: GLDG.
news.summary: GoldMining Inc., a company listed on both the TSX (GOLD) and NYSE (GLDG), has extended its at-the-market equity program, known as the ATM Program, permitting the distribution of up to US$50 million (or equivalent in Canadian dollars). The announcement was made in Vancouver, BC on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: Exro Technologies updates on interest payments for outstanding debentures. TSX: EXRO, OTCQB: EXROF.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on December 20, 2024, Exro Technologies Inc. (TSX: EXRO) (OTCQB: EXROF) released an update on their latest developments. The company is known for offering advanced power control electronics enhancing the performance of electric motors and batteries.

news.headline: Miao embroidery gains global popularity as a fashion item, showcasing traditional Chinese craftsmanship and cultural heritage.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024 in Beijing, it was emphasized that intangible cultural heritage is a vital aspect of Chinese identity, showcasing intricate craftsmanship, traditional Chinese medicine, solemn rituals, and vibrant folk art. Over the centuries, these cultural elements have played a crucial role in preserving the essence of Chinese heritage.

news.headline: Tether injects $775M in video-sharing platform Rumble, following its decision to add Bitcoin to its balance sheet.
news.summary: Tether recently revealed a significant $775 million strategic partnership with video sharing platform Rumble. This announcement comes shortly after Rumble stated its decision to incorporate Bitcoin into its assets.

news.headline: Tether injects $775M into video platform Rumble, following Bitcoin addition news.
news.summary: Tether has made a significant investment of $775 million in the video sharing platform Rumble. This move comes shortly after Rumble's declaration of including Bitcoin in its balance sheet.

news.headline: Jump Trading's Tai Mo Shan to settle SEC probe by paying $123M for alleged violations.
Immutable Holdings Inc. disclosed voting outcome for Annual General Meeting; occurred on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Immutable Holdings Inc. (NEO:HOLD), a publicly-traded blockchain holding company, shared the outcomes of its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders held on the same day. The meeting results were discussed by the Corporation in Toronto.

news.headline: Optical Cable Corporation will discuss Q4 and FY 2024 results in a conference call on Dec. 23.
news.summary: Roanoke-based company Optical Cable Corporation, trading on Nasdaq GM under the ticker symbol OCC, has revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on December 23, 2024. This update will encompass the outcomes for the three-month interval and the overall fiscal year.

news.headline: New University of Macau campus in Hengqin, 375,600 sqm, opens in 2028 for collaborative development.
news.summary: In Beijing on December 20, 2024, it was reported that the University of Macau is constructing a new campus in the Guangdong-Macao In-Depth Cooperation Zone in Hengqin. Spanning about 375,600 square meters, the campus is scheduled to be completed by 2028. It will provide accommodations for a significant number of students and staff.

news.headline: Tether invests $775M in Rumble after Youtube competitor pushes Bitcoin, adopting BTC reserve strategy.
news.summary: Tether, a stablecoin issuer, has decided to invest a substantial amount of $775 million in the popular streaming video platform, Rumble. This platform has recently embraced a strategy that involves a reserve of Bitcoin.

news.headline: Teamsters plan midnight strike at Amazon (AMZN) NYC warehouse.
Schumer working towards passing stopgap tonight
Schumer speaks to reporters
Qualcomm victorious in licensing battle with Arm, securing chip designs. Details undisclosed.
Eli Lilly's weight-loss drug Zepbound approved for sleep apnea treatment, impacting ResMed's market share.
news.summary: On Friday, Eli Lilly received FDA approval for Zepbound, its weight-loss medication, to be used in treating obstructive sleep apnea. This development raises questions about the impact on ResMed's market share.

news.headline: FDA approves Vertex's next-generation triple drug for cystic fibrosis. Stock not expected to rise much.
news.summary: Late on Friday, the Food and Drug Administration approved Vertex Pharmaceuticals' advanced triple drug for cystic fibrosis. This positive development may not have an immediate impact on the stock performance of Vertex Pharmaceuticals.

news.headline: Tai Mo Shan of Jump Trading agrees to settle SEC case by paying $123 million.
Elevai Labs Inc. now PMGC Holdings Inc., relocating to Nevada in a strategic move.
news.summary: A recent report unveils that the global population has surpassed 7.8 billion people, with projections indicating it could reach 9.7 billion by 2050. Urban areas have seen significant growth over rural regions, with over half of the population now residing in cities. The rise in urbanization is expected to continue, with estimates suggesting that 68% of the population will live in urban areas by 2050. This trend poses challenges for infrastructure, resource management, and social services in urban centers. To address these issues, experts highlight the need for sustainable urban planning and development to ensure the well-being of future generations.

news.headline: SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. buys facilities in Washington, D.C., and San Jose, adding 74,300 sq ft property in DC.
news.summary: SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc., based in LADERA RANCH, Calif., has acquired two premier self-storage facilities to strengthen its position in key markets. The Washington, D.C., facility at 1401 22nd Street SE is a Class A property with five stories, providing roughly 74,300 net rentable square feet. In addition, the company also acquired a facility in San Jose, California. The strategic acquisitions mark expansion for SmartStop in prominent locations, demonstrating its commitment to growth and enhancing its portfolio.

news.headline: Bunker Hill to issue 7,392,859 shares in lieu of $517,500 interest payment on Convertible Debentures.
news.summary: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. (TSXV:BNKR | OTCQB:BHLL) located in Kellogg, Idaho and Vancouver, British Columbia, made an announcement on Dec. 20, 2024. The company elected to issue a total of 7,392,859 shares of common stock, referred to as "Interest Shares," to specific holders of 7.5% and 10.5% convertible debentures. This issuance was done to fully settle the interest owed under the Series 1 and Series 2 Convertible Debentures, totaling USD$517,500.00 as of December 31, 2024, making up the "Interest Payment." The Convertible Debentures have maturity dates of March 31, 2028, and March 31, 2029, respectively.

news.headline: 2025 Kia K4 compact sedan earns 2024 IIHS TSP award for occupant protection. Located in Irvine, Calif.
news.summary: In Irvine, California on December 20, 2024, the 2025 Kia K4 compact sedan stands out for its occupant protection, earning the esteemed Insurance Institute of Highway Safety's 2024 IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK (TSP) Award. This recognition highlights the vehicle's commitment to safety standards, benefitting all passengers.

news.headline: IB Parks & Entertainment acquires Big Kahuna's Water Park in West Berlin, NJ, expanding its attractions portfolio.
news.summary: A new attraction, Big Kahuna's Water Park in West Berlin, New Jersey, has been added to IB Parks & Entertainment's portfolio on December 20, 2024. This park, previously called Sahara Sam's Oasis, now joins the company's expanding list of attractions. Big Kahuna's Water Park offers year-round entertainment options, in a location known for its diverse range of activities.

news.headline: Investigation into Methode Electronics, Inc. by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC initiated by former Louisiana Attorney General.
news.summary: In New Orleans on December 20, 2024, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF"), disclosed an ongoing investigation into Methode Electronics, Inc. The inquiry into Methode Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: MEI) began on March 7, 2024.
